_comment: Bob workspace settings. Bob reads this from the .bob/ of its CWD, the same
retryFetchErrors defaults to FALSE in bobshell 1.0.6. Turning it on is what
made stage 5 survivable: run 20260722-2126 died with Bob's own
839 ms after a successful local file read, with duration_ms 0 and
budget_spend at 21.79 of 100. 'terminated' is undici's error for an HTTP
response body closed mid-stream -- the connection from the container to the
model provider dropped, and Bob had no retry enabled to absorb it.
With this on: 3 attempts, 5s initial backoff, 30s max. Costs nothing when
